'''yowagaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:yummo|yummo]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-w-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:yummo|yummo]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| yowagaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:yowagithi|yowagithi]] || [[word:yowagiji|yowagiji]] || [[word:yowagishi|yowagishi]] || [[word:yowagiki|yowagiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:yowaguthuthu|yowaguthuthu]] || [[word:yowagujuju|yowagujuju]] || [[word:yowagushushu|yowagushushu]] || [[word:yowagukuku|yowagukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:yowaguthu|yowaguthu]] || [[word:yowaguju|yowaguju]] || [[word:yowagushu|yowagushu]] || [[word:yowaguku|yowaguku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:yowagufthuf|yowagufthuf]] || [[word:yowagufjuf|yowagufjuf]] || [[word:yowagufshuf|yowagufshuf]] || [[word:yowagufkuf|yowagufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:yowagethe|yowagethe]] || [[word:yowageje|yowageje]] || [[word:yowageshe|yowageshe]] || [[word:yowageke|yowageke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:yowagothotho|yowagothotho]] || [[word:yowagojojo|yowagojojo]] || [[word:yowagoshosho|yowagoshosho]] || [[word:yowagokoko|yowagokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:yowagotho|yowagotho]] || [[word:yowagojo|yowagojo]] || [[word:yowagosho|yowagosho]] || [[word:yowagoko|yowagoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:yowagofthof|yowagofthof]] || [[word:yowagofjof|yowagofjof]] || [[word:yowagofshof|yowagofshof]] || [[word:yowagofkof|yowagofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:yowagÃŸfthÃŸf|yowagÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:yowagÃŸfjÃŸf|yowagÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:yowagÃŸfshÃŸf|yowagÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:yowagÃŸfkÃŸf|yowagÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:yowagÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|yowagÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:yowagÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|yowagÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:yowagÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|yowagÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:yowagÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|yowagÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:yowagÃŸfthÃŸf|yowagÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:yowagÃŸfjÃŸf|yowagÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:yowagÃŸfshÃŸf|yowagÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:yowagÃŸfkÃŸf|yowagÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:yowagÃŸfthÃŸf|yowagÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:yowagÃŸfjÃŸf|yowagÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:yowagÃŸfshÃŸf|yowagÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:yowagÃŸfkÃŸf|yowagÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:yowagÃḊthÃḊ|yowagÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:yowagÃḊjÃḊ|yowagÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:yowagÃḊshÃḊ|yowagÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:yowagÃḊkÃḊ|yowagÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:yowagathatha|yowagathatha]] || [[word:yowagajaja|yowagajaja]] || [[word:yowagashasha|yowagashasha]] || [[word:yowagakaka|yowagakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:yowagatha|yowagatha]] || [[word:yowagaja|yowagaja]] || [[word:yowagasha|yowagasha]] || [[word:yowagaka|yowagaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:yowagafthaf|yowagafthaf]] || [[word:yowagafjaf|yowagafjaf]] || [[word:yowagafshaf|yowagafshaf]] || [[word:yowagafkaf|yowagafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:yowagasha|yowagasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:yowagshÃḋsha|yowagshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:yowagrosha|yowagrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:yowagmusha|yowagmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:yowagyasha|yowagyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyowagnkshÃḋsha|goyowagnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyowagnkrosha|goyowagnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyowagnkmusha|goyowagnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goyowagnkyasha|goyowagnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:yowawagasha|yowawagasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:yowawagshÃḋsha|yowawagshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:yowawagrosha|yowawagrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:yowawagmusha|yowawagmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:yowawagyasha|yowawagyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyowawagnkshÃḋsha|goyowawagnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyowawagnkrosha|goyowawagnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyowawagnkmusha|goyowawagnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goyowawagnkyasha|goyowawagnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:yewÃḊgasha|yewÃḊgasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:yewÃḊgshÃḋsha|yewÃḊgshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:yewÃḊgrosha|yewÃḊgrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:yewÃḊgmusha|yewÃḊgmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:yewÃḊgyasha|yewÃḊgyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyewÃḊgnkshÃḋsha|goyewÃḊgnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyewÃḊgnkrosha|goyewÃḊgnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyewÃḊgnkmusha|goyewÃḊgnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goyewÃḊgnkyasha|goyewÃḊgnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:yowfagasha|yowfagasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:yowfagshÃḋsha|yowfagshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:yowfagrosha|yowfagrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:yowfagmusha|yowfagmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:yowfagyasha|yowfagyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyowfagnkshÃḋsha|goyowfagnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyowfagnkrosha|goyowfagnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyowfagnkmusha|goyowfagnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goyowfagnkyasha|goyowfagnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d2c7592}}
